# openwrt-docs4ai - Complete Flat Catalog
> Includes generated AI-facing helper surfaces and all published L2 source documents.
> **Total Underlying L2 Context:** ~427068 tokens

- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): AI agent usage rules for navigating the generated OpenWrt documentation corpus. (~468 tokens, l3-agent-guide)
